description: Disciplined dimensional fighter who converts takedowns into evasive focus.

presentation.headline: Dimensional martial hunter who turns takedowns into brief phase focus.
presentation.fantasy_hook: Wrapped limbs, a broken void halo, and a compact rift staff frame a disciplined silhouette inside the infernal roster.
presentation.identity_summary: The Void Monk combines portal precision, deliberate spacing, and select heavy tools. Kills briefly improve evasion and attack tempo without adding teleportation or invulnerability.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant dodge and attack speed, stacking up to two times while focus holds.
tradeoffs: Requires takedowns to maintain phase focus
